race_meta.race_name: Safer Gambling At CopyBet Novices' Hurdle (GBB Race)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model correctly identified guet apens (ranked 1st with 55.0% predicted probability). Strong analytical framework.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Guet Apens > They Want Me, but actual result was Guet Apens > Forever Louie. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Guet Apens had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 2.6%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
